name: DNS Tunneling Detected
description: Detects potential DNS tunneling based on unusual query patterns
query:
// DNS Tunneling Detection
// High volume or long DNS queries to same domain
events from dns
where event_type = "dns_query"
  and (query_length > 50 or query_type = "TXT")
group by source_ip, query_domain
having count(*) > 100
within 300 seconds
